problem:
Which of the following, when rounded to the nearest hundredth, does not round to 65.14?
A) 65.141
B) 65.138
C) 65.1339999
D) 65.1401
E) 65.14444

Your answer should be a letter: A, B, C, D, or E.

classified_questions.question: Can you define what rounding to the nearest hundredth means?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: How do you determine which way to round (up or down) when the digit in the thousandth place is exactly 5?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: Can you explain why 65.141 (A), 65.1401 (D), and 65.14444 (E) round down to 65.14?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Why does 65.138 (B) round up to 65.14 despite the digit in the thousandth place being less than 5?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How do you know that 65.1339999 (C) rounds to 65.13, and why does it not round to 65.14?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: If you were asked to round to the nearest tenth instead of the nearest hundredth, how would that change your answer choices?
classified_questions.label: e
